label: Battery Room Alarm
info:
Battery-room alarm. Watches the door + 2 motion sensors and writes
to `input_select.alarm_state`. State machine logic is duplicated from
`dashboard/lib/alarm-fsm.js` — `scripts/check.sh` enforces they stay
in sync.

Transitions:
  disarmed → arming (auto-arm conditions met) OR (UI sets 'arming')
  arming → armed (after `alarm_arming_quiet_minutes` of quiet)
  armed → triggered (door open OR motion after grace)
  * → disarmed (UI sets 'disarmed')

Outputs on transitions:
  → triggered: siren start over MQTT, push notification to all mobile apps
  → disarmed: siren stop over MQTT
  always: write state, trigger reason to HA helpers

name: Alarm FSM
